place.summary: Hong Kong Cultural Centre functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Victoria Harbour. Visitors often continue to Victoria Harbour. Its observed experience trails the category average, despite existing visitor demand.

inbound.origin_poi_name: Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Victoria Harbour
opportunity_cards.detail: Hong Kong Cultural Centre frequently appears alongside Victoria Harbour, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: High visibility, weaker experience
opportunity_cards.detail: Hong Kong Cultural Centre draws meaningful traffic but performs below its category average on experience.
